verses.text: Hih thute khempeuh a kisep khit ciangin keima kiangah makaite pawlkhat hong pai-in, “Hih gama teng gamdang mite' nitna leh Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Jebus mite, Ammon mite, Moab mite, Egypt mite, leh Amor' mite' gamtat a kihhuaite panin Israel mi, siampite leh Levi mite nangawn zong, a siangtho-in tuam omlo uh hi

Amaute leh a tapate un hih gama teng minam dangte' numeite ten'pih uh a, tua thu hangin a siangtho minam pen tu-in gamdang mite tawh a kihel suak ta hi. Tua hi a, hih thu-ah makaite leh thukhen uliante pen a khial masa ahi uh hi,” hong ci uh hi
Hih thu ka zak ciangin dah mahmahin ka puante balkekin, ka sam leh ka khamul botin, cihna ding theiloin ka om hi
Tua ciangin sal a suak hih mite' cihtaklohna hangin Israel Pasian' gimpiak ding lau-in a ling mite khempeuh kei kiangah hong kikhawm uh a, nitak biakpiak hun dong cihna ding theiloin ka om hi
Tua hi a, nitak biakpiak hun ciangin khua phawk kikin ka puankekpi mah silh kawmin khukdin'in Topa Pasian' lamah ka khut zakin
“Ka biak Pasian aw, ka mawhnate un ka lu dawn dong uh hong vuknelhin vantung dong banto ahih manin nangma lam kong et ding maizumin ka mai a san hi, ka Pasian aw

Ka pu ka pate uh huna kipanin tuhun dong mawhna lianpi ka nei uh hi. Tua thu hangin ka kumpite uh leh ka siampite un gamdang kumpite' khutsungah sihna, salsuahna, neihsa kisuhna, leh maizumna thuak uh a, tuhunin zong tua bangmah ka thuak uh hi

Ahi zongin tu-in Topa ka Pasian un tomkha sung kote hong hehpih a, a suakta pawlkhat hong omsakin nangma mun siangtho-ah siksan ding mun nong pia hi. Nangmah in ka mit uh hong vaksak kikin ka salsuahna uhah ka nuntakna uh ka thakpat theihna ding uh kalsuan cilna nong pia hi

Kote pen sal ka hi takpi uh hi; ahi zongin ka salsuahna uhah ka Pasian un nong nusia kei a, kote' Pasian' biakinn puahkikin ka din'sakkik theihna ding uh leh Judah leh Jerusalem-ah kidalna kulh ka neih theihna dingun kipat thakna na hong piak theihna dingin Persia kumpite ko tungah a thunuam dingin nong bawlsak hi

“Kote' Pasian aw, hih bang hi khin ahih ciangin kote in bang gen thei nawn ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh kamsang na nasemte tung tawnin kote thu hong pia-in, ‘Note va lutin na luah ding uh gam pen, tua gama a na teng gamdang mite in ninsakin a kihhuai a gamtatnate uh tawh mong khat pan mong khat dongin a ninsa gam nin ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin na tanute uh amau' tapate tawh kitengsak kei un la, na tapate uh zi dingin amau' tanute zong la kei un. Amaute' phattuamna ding leh a mavan'na ding uh hanciam kei un. Tua bang hi leh note thahatin tua gama piangte nuamtakin na ne ding uh a, na tate un a luah tawntung dingun tua gam na piasawn thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in nong thupiaknate ka zui kei uh hi

Tu-in kote' gamtatsiate leh a lian ka mawhnate uh hangin hih bang gimna lian ka thuak uh hi; ahi zongin nangmah in kote' tuah dinga kilawmzah gimna hong tuaksak loin, tu-a banga a nungta lai-in nong omsak zaw hi

Hih banga ka thuak khit uh ciangin kote in na thupiaknate manglo kikin, a kihhuai-in a gamta mite tawh kitengin kizomkik ding ka hi uh hiam? Tua bang hi kik le-ung, a suakta, a nungta ka om nawnloh dongun kote' tungah na hehna hong tungsak ding hilo na hi hiam

Israel Pasian, Topa aw, nang na thutang a, ahi zongin tuni-a a omlai ko teng nong suaktasak veve hi. Na muhna-ah kote a mawhpi mah hita le-ung hong hehpih in; bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna tawh nangma mai-ah kuamah om theilo hi,” ci-in thu ka ngen hi.
